debug_info.goal:
xs ys : List ℕ
h : ∀ x ∈ xs, (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x
⊢ (∀ x ∈ ys, (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x) → ∀ x ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ x

failed_attempts:
intro hys x hx
   have hhead : ys.head! = (xs ++ ys).head! := by
     cases xs with
     | nil => simp
     | cons a as => simp
   simpa [hhead] using hys x hx

intro hys x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     simpa [List.head!, List.cons_append] using hhead

intro hys x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
   cases xs with
   | nil =>
     simpa using hhead
   | cons a as =>
     have : (a :: as ++ ys).head! = a := by rfl
     have : (ys.head!) ≤ x := by
       have h0 : a ≤ ys.head! := hys (ys.head!) (by
         cases ys with
         | nil => simp at hx
         | cons b bs => simp)
       exact le_trans h0 (by simpa [this] using hhead)
     exact this

intro hy
   intro x hx
   have hxy : ys.head! ≤ x := by
     have : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := by
       have : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
         exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
       exact hy x this
     simpa [List.head!, List.head!_append] using this
   exact hxy

intro hys x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     have hhead' : (xs ++ y :: ys).head! = y := by rfl
     simpa [hhead'] using hhead

intro x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hxy : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
   cases xs with
   | nil =>
     simpa using hxy
   | cons a as =>
     simpa using hxy

intro hys x hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
     cases xs with
     | nil => simp at *
     | cons a as =>
       cases ys with
       | nil => simp at hx
       | cons b bs =>
         simp
   simpa [hhead] using h x hx

intro hys
   intro x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := hys x hx'
   have hheads : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := hys (ys.head!) (by
     simpa using (List.head!_mem_self (l := ys)))
   exact le_trans hheads hhead

intro x hx
   have hxy : ys.head! ≤ x := by
     have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
       exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
     have := h x hx'
     simpa [List.head!_append_of_ne_nil (xs := xs) (ys := ys) (by
       cases ys with
       | nil => cases hx
       | cons a as => simp)] using this
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := by
     cases ys with
     | nil => cases hx
     | cons a as =>
       have : a ∈ xs ++ a :: as := by
         exact List.mem_append_right xs (by simp)
       simpa [List.head!_append_of_ne_nil (xs := xs) (ys := a :: as) (by simp)] using h a this
   exact le_trans hhead hxy

intro hys
   intro x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := hys x hx'
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     simp [List.head!] at hhead ⊢
     exact hhead

intro hys
   intro x hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
     cases xs with
     | nil => simp
     | cons a as => simp
   simpa [hhead] using hys x hx

intro hys x hx
   by_cases hxs : xs = []
   · subst hxs
     simpa using hys x hx
   · have hx0 : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
       exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
     have hy0 : ys.head! ≤ x := by
       have : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx0
       simpa [List.head!_append hxs] using this
     have hyhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := by
       by_cases hysnil : ys = []
       · subst hysnil
         simpa using hx
       · have : ys.head! ∈ xs ++ ys := by
           exact List.mem_append_right xs (List.head!_mem_self hysnil)
         have : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := h _ this
         simpa [List.head!_append hxs] using this
     exact le_trans hyhead hy0

intro hys x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
   have hheads : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
     simpa [List.head!, List.getLast?_eq_get?_last, List.get?_append_right] using (List.head!_append_of_ne_nil xs (by
       cases ys with
       | nil => cases hx
       | cons y ys => simp))
   simpa [hheads] using hhead

intro z hz
   have hx : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ z := h z (by
     simp [List.mem_append, hz])
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := h (ys.head!) (by
     simp [List.mem_append]
     right
     exact List.head!_mem_self (l := ys))
   exact le_trans hhead hx

intro hy
   have hxys : (xs ++ ys).head! = (ys.head!) := by
     cases xs with
     | nil => simp
     | cons a as => simp
   intro x hx
   have : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := hy x hx
   simpa [hxys] using this

intro hys x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     have hy : (xs ++ y :: ys).head! ≤ y := h y (by simp)
     simpa [List.head!, List.append_assoc] using hys x (by simp [hx])

intro hys
   intro x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     simp at hx
     have hyhead : (xs ++ y :: ys).head! = y := by simp
     simpa [hyhead] using hhead

intro hy x hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := by
     cases ys with
     | nil =>
       simp at hx
     | cons y ys =>
       have : (y :: ys).head! = y := by rfl
       simp [List.head!, this]
       exact hy y (by simp)
   exact le_trans hhead (hy x hx)

intro hys x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
   have hhead' : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
     cases xs with
     | nil => simp
     | cons a as => simp
   simpa [hhead'] using hhead

intro hys x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     have : (xs ++ y :: ys).head! = (y :: ys).head! := by
       cases xs <;> rfl
     have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ y :: ys := by
       exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
     have := h x hx'
     simpa [this] using this

intro hy
   intro x hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := by
     simpa [List.head!, hy]
   have hx' : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := by
     exact hy x hx
   exact le_trans hhead hx'

intro hys x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     have hy : (xs ++ (y :: ys)).head! ≤ y := h y (by simp)
     have hyx : (xs ++ (y :: ys)).head! ≤ x := hys x (by simpa using hx)
     simpa [List.head!] using le_trans hy hyx

intro hys
   intro x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
     cases xs <;> simp at *
   simpa [hhead] using h x hx'

intro hys x hx
   have : ys.head! ≤ x := by
     by_cases hnil : ys = []
     · subst hnil
       cases hx
     · have hhead : ys.head! ∈ ys := by
         simpa [List.head!, hnil] using List.head?_mem ys hnil
       have hhead' : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := hys (ys.head!) hhead
       have hx' : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := hys x hx
       exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by simpa [List.head!, hnil] using (List.head!_append_of_ne_nil xs hnil).symm)) (le_trans hhead' hx')
   exact this

intro hys
   intro x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys' =>
     simp [List.head!] at hys ⊢
     have : (xs ++ y :: ys').head! = xs.head! := by
       cases xs <;> rfl
     simpa [this] using hys x (by simpa using hx)

intro hys x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hxle : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := hys (ys.head!) (List.head!_mem_self ys)
   exact le_trans hhead hxle

intro hys x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil => cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     have hy : (xs ++ y :: ys).head! = y := by
       cases xs <;> rfl
     have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ y :: ys := by
       exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
     have hxle : (xs ++ y :: ys).head! ≤ x := h x hx'
     simpa [hy] using hxle

intro hys
   intro x hx
   have hx' : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
     exact List.mem_append_right xs hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
     cases xs with
     | nil => simp
     | cons a as => simp
   have := h x hx'
   simpa [hhead] using this

intro hys x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil =>
     cases hx
   | cons y ys =>
     have hyx : y ≤ x := by
       have : ∀ x ∈ y :: ys, (xs ++ y :: ys).head! ≤ x := by
         simpa [List.all, List.head!, List.mem_cons] using hys
       have hy : (xs ++ y :: ys).head! ≤ y := by
         exact this y (by simp)
       have hx' : (xs ++ y :: ys).head! ≤ x := by
         exact this x (by simp [hx])
       exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by rfl)) (le_trans (le_of_eq (by rfl)) (le_trans hy hx'))
     simpa [List.head!] using hyx

intro hy
   have hne : (xs ++ ys) ≠ [] := by
     cases ys with
     | nil =>
       cases xs with
       | nil =>
         simp at hy
       | cons a as =>
         simp
     | cons b bs =>
       simp
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
     simpa [List.head!, hne] using (List.head!_append_of_ne_nil xs (by
       cases ys <;> simp at hne ⊢; exact hne))
   intro x hx
   have : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := by
     exact hy x hx
   simpa [hhead] using this

intro hy x hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
     cases xs <;> simp
   simpa [hhead] using hy x hx

intro hys x hx
   have hhead : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ ys.head! := hys (ys.head!) (by
     cases ys with
     | nil => cases hx
     | cons y ys => simp)
   have hx' : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := hys x hx
   exact le_trans hhead hx'
